sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n116078" key="w)i/+zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὠΐζω</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ὤιον, ᾠόν</etym>) <sense id="n116078.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to sit on eggs, brood,</tr_> Id. (Fort. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὤιζω</foreign> [i. e. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾤζω</foreign>], cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐπῴζω.</foreign>)</sense> </entryFree>
